entries.name: EmptyWorkflowName
entries.remediation: Workflow name cannot be empty or whitespace

entries.name: NoStepsFound
entries.remediation: Could not find any steps in workflow '{0}'. Ensure the workflow uses StartWith<T>(), Then<T>(), and Finally<T>() methods.

entries.name: DuplicateStepName
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' appears multiple times in workflow '{1}'. Each step type should be unique.

entries.name: InvalidNamespace
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' must be declared in a namespace. Global namespace is not supported.

entries.name: MissingStartWith
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' must begin with StartWith<T>(). Found '{1}' instead.

entries.name: MissingFinally
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' does not end with Finally<T>(). Consider adding a Finally step to mark workflow completion.

entries.name: ForkWithoutJoin
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' has a Fork that is not followed by Join. Every Fork must be closed with a Join<T>() call.

entries.name: LoopWithoutBody
entries.remediation: Loop '{0}' in workflow '{1}' has no steps in its body. A loop must contain at least one step.

entries.name: InvalidPersistenceMode
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' specifies an unrecognized Persistence value ({1}). Valid values are SagaDocument (0) and EventSourced (1).

entries.name: EventSourcedRequiresState
entries.remediation: Workflow '{0}' uses PersistenceMode.EventSourced but no state type was found. Event-sourced workflows require a state type that implements IEventSourcedState<TState> with an ApplyEvent method.

entries.name: CompensateNotAStep
entries.summary: Compensation step is not a workflow step
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' in workflow '{1}' compensates with '{2}', which does not implement IWorkflowStep<TState>. Compensation types must be a registered workflow step.

entries.name: ConfidenceThresholdOutOfRange
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' in workflow '{1}' calls RequireConfidence({2}). The threshold must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

entries.name: RequireConfidenceWithoutHandler
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' in workflow '{1}' calls RequireConfidence but declares no OnLowConfidence handler. Add OnLowConfidence(alt => ...) so low-confidence results have a routing path.

entries.name: RetryMaxAttemptsBelowOne
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' in workflow '{1}' configures WithRetry({2}). The maxAttempts value must be at least 1.

entries.name: NonPositiveTimeout
entries.remediation: Step '{0}' in workflow '{1}' configures WithTimeout with a non-positive duration. The timeout must be greater than zero.
